headline: Meta's staff monitoring practices raise data privacy concerns for healthcare tech
body: Meta is implementing mandatory breaks from workplace keylogging systems, signaling internal friction over employee data collection practices. Healthcare organizations evaluating AI infrastructure and vendor partnerships must scrutinize data handling policies, particularly for systems processing patient information or clinical workflows. The incident reflects broader vendor accountability issues in healthcare AI adoption. As compliance requirements tighten around HIPAA and state privacy laws, healthcare leaders should demand explicit data governance commitments from technology partners before integration into EHR systems or clinical decision support tools.
